message:
feat(conformance): add benchmarking telemetry and environment fingerprinting

Enhance benchmark infrastructure with comprehensive observability:
- Per-workload telemetry: throughput (elements/sec) and bandwidth
  (MiB/sec) at p50/p95 via new WorkloadTelemetry struct
- Environment fingerprint: OS, architecture, CPU count, rustc version
- Reproducibility metadata via ReproMetadata: command, repo root,
  output path, and cargo profile for deterministic replay
- Evidence log reference discovery for test contract and workflow
  scenario results via discover_evidence_log_refs()
- Updated time_workload() to accept element/byte counts for
  telemetry collection across all three benchmark workloads

Test assertions validate all new fields for baseline integrity.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
